mapper.sql: SELECT weight_id, level1_name, level1_ratio, level2_name, level2_ratio, level3_name, level3_ratio, total_weight, indicator_code, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark FROM jw_branch_efficiency_weight
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_branch_efficiency_weight ( level1_name, level1_ratio, level2_name, level2_ratio, level3_name, level3_ratio, total_weight, indicator_code, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{level1Name}, #{level1Ratio}, #{level2Name}, #{level2Ratio}, #{level3Name}, #{level3Ratio}, #{totalWeight}, #{indicatorCode}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO jw_branch_efficiency_weight ( level1_name, level1_ratio, level2_name, level2_ratio, level3_name, level3_ratio, total_weight, indicator_code, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{level1Name}, #{level1Ratio}, #{level2Name}, #{level2Ratio}, #{level3Name}, #{level3Ratio}, #{totalWeight}, #{indicatorCode}, sysdate(), sysdate() )

INSERT INTO jw_branch_efficiency_weight ( level1_name, level1_ratio, level2_name, level2_ratio, level3_name, level3_ratio, total_weight, indicator_code, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.level1Name}, #{item.level1Ratio}, #{item.level2Name}, #{item.level2Ratio}, #{item.level3Name}, #{item.level3Ratio}, #{item.totalWeight}, #{item.indicatorCode}, sysdate(), sysdate())
